prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CG55HTBS-MED-BLCK Product Type: SCISSORS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Cushion Grip 5.5" Hair and Beard Trimmer Precision Barber Scissors Description: Precision and comfort come together in these 5.5" Cushion Grip Stainless Steel Barber Scissors.

Designed specifically for cutting hair these sharpened scissors are ideal for barbers, trimming mustaches and beards, and/or cutting fur.

The 3 inch blade is the optimal size for control, maneuverability, and a healthy cut. Search Terms: barber scissors hair trimmer beard cutter soft grip shears comfortable scissors hobby tools precision tools Home Safety kitchen accessories Features: - Designed for Cutting Hair, Mustaches and Beards, or Fur - Optimal Size for Precision, Maneuverability, and a Healthy Cut - Rubberized Cushion Grip for Extra Comfort - 3" Stainless Steel Blades | 5.5" Total Length - Sharp Cutting Edges with 1.55mm Blade Thickness === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 5.5" Black Cushion Grip Barber Scissors

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 5.5in Black Hair and Beard Trimmer Scissors

anthropic.title_differentiation: Precision Hair And Beard Trimmer, 3" Stainless Steel Blades, Rubberized Soft Grip, Sharp Cutting Edges

openai.title_differentiation: Rubberized Cushion Grip, 3 Inch Stainless Steel Blades, Sharp Precision Cut, Optimal Control For Hair Beard And Fur
